sql: WITH active_orders AS (SELECT o.id, o.user_id, o.amount, o.created_at FROM orders o WHERE o.status IN (#{statusList}) AND o.amount >= #{minAmount}), user_summary AS (SELECT u.id, u.name, COUNT(o.id) as order_count, SUM(o.amount) as total_amount FROM users u LEFT JOIN active_orders o ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE u.department = #{deptFilter} GROUP BY u.id, u.name), top_users AS (SELECT * FROM user_summary WHERE order_count >= #{minOrders} ORDER BY total_amount DESC LIMIT #{limit}) SELECT tu.*, ou.id as latest_order_id, ou.amount as latest_order_amount FROM top_users tu LEFT JOIN (SELECT o.user_id, o.id, o.amount, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY o.user_id ORDER BY o.created_at DESC) as rn FROM orders o) ou ON tu.id = ou.user_id AND ou.rn = 1
templateSql:
WITH
active_orders AS (
    SELECT o.id, o.user_id, o.amount, o.created_at
    FROM orders o
    <where>
        <if test="statusList != null and statusList.size() > 0">
            o.status IN
            <foreach collection="statusList" item="s" open="(" separator="," close=")">
                #{s}
            </foreach>
        </if>
        <if test="minAmount != null">
            AND o.amount >= #{minAmount}
        </if>
    </where>
),
user_summary AS (
    SELECT u.id, u.name, COUNT(o.id) as order_count, SUM(o.amount) as total_amount
    FROM users u
    LEFT JOIN active_orders o ON u.id = o.user_id
    <if test="deptFilter != null">
        WHERE u.department = #{deptFilter}
    </if>
    GROUP BY u.id, u.name
),
top_users AS (
    SELECT * FROM user_summary
    <if test="minOrders != null">
        WHERE order_count >= #{minOrders}
    </if>
    ORDER BY total_amount DESC
    <if test="limit != null">
        LIMIT #{limit}
    </if>
)
SELECT tu.*, ou.id as latest_order_id, ou.amount as latest_order_amount
FROM top_users tu
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT o.user_id, o.id, o.amount,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY o.user_id ORDER BY o.created_at DESC) as rn
    FROM orders o
) ou ON tu.id = ou.user_id AND ou.rn = 1
